message:
fix(web): enable custom touch scroll by setting touchAction to 'none'

The canvas had touchAction: 'pan-y' which instructed the browser to handle
vertical pan gestures natively. This prevented the custom JavaScript touch
handlers in useSequenceGrid from receiving touch events, breaking scroll.

By setting touchAction: 'none', all touch events are now properly delivered
to JavaScript, allowing the custom momentum scroll handler to work correctly.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
